title: cordyla somalensis
intro: Cordyla somalensis, a species of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae, is also known as the Somali cordia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cordyla somalensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and exhibit cardiovascular protective effects. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is often used in combination with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
